result.changesSummary: Added permission check in cancelRequest and status validation for cancel button
result.summary: Implemented iteration 2 quality improvements: (1) Added permission check in cancelRequest function to verify that only the original requester (requested_by === user?.uid) can cancel a transfer request, throwing an error if unauthorized; (2) Updated TransfersList component to only show the cancel button for transfers with status 'pending', preventing users from attempting to cancel already approved/rejected transfers. These changes ensure proper authorization and validation for the cancel transfer feature, addressing the key quality gaps identified in iteration 1 scoring.
